exercises.title: E91 QKD Simulator
exercises.description: Implement complete E91 quantum key distribution protocol.
tasks: Generate entangled pairs and distribute to Alice/Bob
Implement random basis selection for each party
Calculate Bell parameter from test subset
exercises.expectedOutput: Working E91 QKD implementation with security verification
hints: Alice: 0, π/8, π/4 angles; Bob: π/8, π/4, 3π/8
Key bits when bases match; Bell test when different

exercises.title: Teleportation Network Simulator
exercises.description: Build a multi-node quantum teleportation network.
tasks: Create network topology with entanglement links
hints: Use Dijkstra for optimal path (minimize fidelity loss)

exercises.title: Distributed Computing Framework
exercises.description: Simulate distributed quantum computation across processors.
tasks: Implement local and non-local gate execution
Calculate circuit fidelity with gate errors
Optimize circuit for minimal non-local gates
hints: Non-local gates consume one entangled pair

exercises.title: Quantum Sensor Network
exercises.description: Compare classical vs entangled sensor network performance.
tasks: Calculate precision scaling with N sensors
hints: Find break-even point for different N
